theme: 荒野乱斗从小白到高手系统攻略图

items.title: 从小白到高手路线图
items.description: 把操作、瞄准、弹药、兵线、模式目标、英雄池和复盘串成一条成长路径。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese esports coaching infographic for Brawl Stars beginners, no official logo, no exact game UI, no copied character art. Title area: 荒野乱斗：从小白到高手路线图. Show an 8-step learning road from first week to ranked climb: controls, aim, dodge, ammo, lane, mode objective, brawler pool, replay review. Use stylized generic chibi hero silhouettes, joystick icon, trophy path, map tiles, checklist cards. Clean mobile-game guide style, dark navy background with neon yellow, cyan, and magenta accents, high information density, readable short Chinese labels, no real screenshots.

items.title: 强势英雄不是无脑选
items.description: 用当前榜单信号解释 Colette、Edgar、Crow、Mortis、Colt 等强势英雄必须结合地图和阵容理解。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese meta guide infographic for Brawl Stars, no official logo, no exact game UI, no copied character art. Title: 当前强势英雄怎么理解：不是无脑选 S 级. Create a tier-and-context board: top row 版本强势信号 with labels Colette, Edgar, Crow, Mortis, Colt shown as generic role icons rather than exact portraits; second row 看地图与模式 with open map, walls map, bushes map, objective map; third row 看队伍缺口 damage, control, assassin, anti-tank, thrower. Include warning cards: 强度会随平衡调整, 先练 3-5 个本命. Clean esports analysis board, dark background, cyan/yellow/red accents, readable Chinese labels, high information density.

items.title: 英雄定位与兵线心法
items.description: 用坦克、刺客、射手、投掷、控场、辅助六类角色说明抢线、换位和反制关系。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars learning infographic, no official logo, no copied character art. Title: 英雄定位与兵线心法. Show six role cards with generic icons and silhouettes: 坦克, 刺客, 射手, 投掷, 控场, 辅助. Center: a three-lane map diagram with left/mid/right lanes, choke points, bushes, walls, safe zones. Add decision arrows: 抢线, 压血, 换位, 控草, 开大, 回撤. Include small matchup matrix: range beats tank, assassin punishes sniper, thrower punishes walls, control wins objective. Clean esports coaching board, dark arena-grid background, bright role colors, readable Chinese labels, high density, no game screenshots.

items.title: 高手操作四件事
items.description: 拆解弹药经济、走位、预判和技能循环，并列出新手最常见的操作错误。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars micro-mechanics infographic, no official logo, no copied UI. Title: 高手操作核心：弹药、走位、预判、技能循环. Layout with four large panels: 1 ammo economy with three bullet bars and reload timing; 2 aiming prediction with dotted trajectories and enemy dodge cones; 3 cover dancing around walls and bushes; 4 super and gadget timing loop. Add common mistakes strip: 空枪追击, 满弹不用, 站桩输出, 盲进草, 大招单开. Use stylized generic top-down arena diagrams and chibi silhouettes, neon coaching-board style, dark grid background, readable Chinese labels, high information density.

items.title: 模式打法速查
items.description: 把宝石、足球、热区、赏金、金库、淘汰赛六种模式压成目标优先的打法卡片。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars game-mode playbook infographic, no official logo, no screenshots. Title: 模式打法速查：目标比击杀更重要. Six mode cards with generic icons and mini maps: 宝石争霸 Gem Grab, 乱斗足球 Brawl Ball, 热区争夺 Hot Zone, 赏金猎人 Bounty, 金库攻防 Heist, 淘汰赛 Knockout. For each: objective, win condition, first 20 seconds, common mistake. Use top-down stylized maps, arrows, role icons, stopwatch, trophy. Clean esports guide style, dark background, readable Chinese labels, bright color-coded mode cards, high density, no copyrighted character designs.

items.title: 地图读法与反制选择
items.description: 从开阔图、墙多图、草丛图和目标图推导角色选择、克制链与选禁清单。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars draft and counter-pick infographic, no official logo, no screenshots. Title: 地图读法与反制选择. Main board: four map archetypes: 开阔远程图, 墙多投掷图, 草丛埋伏图, 热区目标图. For each show best role types and counters. Include counter triangle: 坦克, 反坦克, 刺客, 射手, 投掷, 控场. Add pick/ban checklist: 先看墙体, 再看草丛, 再看目标, 最后看队友. Include examples as text names in small chips: Piper, Colt, Bull, Bibi, Crow, Colette, Barley, Spike, Griff, Leon, but generic icons only. Dark tactical board, high-density readable Chinese labels.

items.title: 怎么花钱最划算
items.description: 以先战力后外观为原则，按零氪、月卡型、小氪和收藏党分配升级与消费优先级。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars economy and spending guide infographic, no official logo, no real shop screenshots. Title: 怎么花钱最划算：先战力，后外观. Show a value ladder: 1 free quests and events, 2 choose a small core brawler pool, 3 upgrade to key power levels, 4 buy high-value pass or bundles only if actively playing, 5 consider hypercharge/value offers, 6 cosmetics with spare budget. Include avoid list: 随机冲动, 只买皮肤, 分散升级, 追每个新英雄, 非官方充值. Show budget buckets: 零氪, 月卡型, 小氪, 收藏党. Use coin, gem, ticket, safe-wallet icons, upgrade tree, warning signs. Clean finance-meets-game guide style, dark background, green/gold/cyan accents, readable Chinese labels, no logos, no copied UI.

items.title: 30 天训练闭环
items.description: 把每天 45 分钟训练拆成热身、认真对局、复盘失败和指标追踪四个动作。
items.prompt: Horizontal Chinese Brawl Stars 30-day improvement plan infographic, no official logo, no screenshots, no copied character art. Title: 30 天从小白到高手：训练闭环. Show calendar divided into 4 weeks: Week 1 controls and survival, Week 2 role pool and mode basics, Week 3 draft and matchup review, Week 4 ranked climb and replay analysis. Include daily 45-minute routine: warm-up aim, 5 serious matches, replay one loss, write one mistake, upgrade one goal. Add KPI dashboard: survival time, hit rate, ammo waste, deaths first, objective time, win streak. Use coaching notebook, arena mini maps, stopwatch, replay icon, target icon, rank ladder. Dark esports dashboard, cyan/orange accents, readable Chinese labels, high information density.
